subcodes.first_line: O thou who possessest wisdom! Thy letter, together with the names mentioned therein, hath been presented before the Divine Throne and hath attained unto divine favor. If God willeth, all shall be blessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ک اظ م کتابت مع اسامی مذکوره لدی العرش حاضر و بطرف عنایت حق فائز انشاء الله کل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
